headline: Elon Musk Had A Secret Child Via Surrogate — Here's How The World Found Out
summary: Welcome to the family, Y! In a surprise reveal last year, Grimes disclosed that she and Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk secretly birthed their second child together.

headline: Musk Tweeted: Tesla's competitive position would improve if all subsidies ended.
Elon Musk Tweeted: Tesla is increasing production rapidly in Texas, California & Nevada. Our competitors require subsidies, not us. That said, if competitors get subsidies, Tesla should get them too.
